author: Alexandre Kirszenberg
subject: feat(add-remove-facet): add methods to add and remove facets from SearchParameters configuration (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#333)
body:
* feat(add-remove-facet): add methods to add and remove facets from SearchParameters configuration

* Fix tests

* Use filter for cleaner code

* Clear refinements on facet removal

* Remove unused dependency

* addHierarchicalFacet throws when facet already declared

* Add the six new methods to the doc

* Fix copy paste mistake
